drillName: Oil Pressure CAS Annunciated — Below 40 PSI [Airborne]
sourceNote: Full MCC callout drill from FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.4.2, Group 2 procedure (confirm first). Exact callouts. Memory items = engine in-flight shutdown. If airspeed < 100 KIAS after power reduction, select FLAPS 10°. All ▲ items requiresConfirmation=true.

memory.action: OIL PRESSURE CAS MESSAGE ANNUNCIATED — BELOW 40 PSI
memory.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.4.2; MCC Callouts; QRH EN-3

memory.action: OIL PRESSURE GAUGE — CHECK to confirm below 40 PSI
memory.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.4.2; MCC Callouts; QRH EN-3

memory.action: POWER AND PROP LEVERS (UNAFFECTED ENGINE) — MAX POWER
memory.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.4.2; MCC Callouts; QRH EN-3

memory.action: CONFIRM L/R ENGINE POWER LEVER RETARD TO 10 PSI
